name: Mathematics
description: Explore limits, differentiation, integration, and applications of calculus in scientific modeling.

modules.title: Module 1: Limits & Continuity
modules.desc: Foundational calculus concepts describing function behaviors near specific values.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Intuitive Definition of Limits
lessons.desc: Investigating limit behaviors graphically and numerically as values approach a point.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Epsilon-Delta Definition of Limits
lessons.desc: Proving limits rigorously using mathematical continuity bounds.

modules.title: Module 2: Derivatives & Applications
modules.desc: Rate of change calculations, graphing slopes, and optimization problems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Power Rule & Chain Rule
lessons.desc: Practicing algebraic rules for quick derivative computations.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Optimization & Extrema
lessons.desc: Using critical points to solve real-world efficiency and volume maximization scenarios.

name: Physics
description: Study Newtonian mechanics, optics, thermodynamics, and quantum mechanics fundamentals.

modules.title: Module 1: Classical Mechanics
modules.desc: Analysing motion, forces, momentum, and conservation laws in macroscopic systems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Newton's Laws of Motion
lessons.desc: Forces, inertia, friction coefficient equations, and action-reaction pairings.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Work-Energy Theorem
lessons.desc: Calculating kinetic vs. potential energy conservation in gravitational fields.

name: Computer Science
description: Delve into algorithms, computational theory, machine learning, and software architectures.

modules.title: Module 1: Advanced Data Structures
modules.desc: Exploring arrays, linked nodes, trees, and hash tables for optimized storage.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Trees & Balanced BSTs
lessons.desc: Implementing AVL and Red-Black trees for O(log N) lookup speeds.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Graph Traversals & Trees
lessons.desc: Writing Depth-First Search (DFS) and Breadth-First Search (BFS) graph pathing.

name: Chemistry
description: Discover reaction thermodynamics, organic synthesis paths, and molecular kinetics.

modules.title: Module 1: Organic Chemistry
modules.desc: Hydrocarbons, functional group reactions, and molecular orbital geometry structures.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Alkanes & Stereochemistry
lessons.desc: Naming branched alkanes and analyzing chiral carbon structures.

name: English Literature
description: Analyze creative prose writing styles, structures, drama, and historical poetry blocks.

modules.title: Module 1: Shakespearean Tragedy
modules.desc: Exploring the narrative arcs, themes of power, and soliloquies in classic plays.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Analysis of Hamlet
lessons.desc: Unpacking character motivations, moral dilemmas, and structural pacing in Hamlet.

name: Microbiology
description: Examine cell genetics, virus cycles, pathogens, and cell cultivation lab protocols.

modules.title: Module 1: Virology & Bacterial Cycles
modules.desc: Differentiating lytic vs. lysogenic virus paths in microscopic bacterial hosts.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Lytic and Lysogenic Replication
lessons.desc: Examining phage cycles and integration methods into host genomes.

name: History
description: Study ancient civilizations, world wars, and the political evolutions of modern human societies.

modules.title: Module 1: Rise and Fall of Empires
modules.desc: Analyzing common socio-economic factors in the collapse of ancient civilizations.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: The Roman Empire
lessons.desc: Studying the administrative challenges and military overreaches of ancient Rome.

name: Astrophysics
description: Explore stellar physics, cosmological evolution, black holes, and the physical laws governing the universe.

modules.title: Module 1: Stellar Evolution
modules.desc: Nucleosynthesis, fusion lifecycles, and the formation of cosmic objects.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Main Sequence Stars
lessons.desc: How hydrogen fusion maintains hydrostatic equilibrium in stellar cores.

name: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
description: Explore the core concepts of AI including search algorithms, knowledge representation, machine learning, and ethics.

modules.title: Module 1: Introduction & History of AI
modules.desc: Foundational calculus concepts describing function behaviors near specific values.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: What is AI? Definition & Turing Test
lessons.desc: Investigating limit behaviors graphically and numerically as values approach a point.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Historical Milestones & Dartmouth Workshop
lessons.desc: Proving limits rigorously using mathematical continuity bounds.

modules.title: Module 2: State-Space Search & Planning
modules.desc: Rate of change calculations, graphing slopes, and optimization problems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Uninformed Search: BFS & DFS
lessons.desc: Practicing algebraic rules for quick derivative computations.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Informed Search: A* & Heuristics
lessons.desc: Using critical points to solve real-world efficiency and volume maximization scenarios.

modules.title: Module 3: Knowledge Representation & Logic
modules.desc: How AI systems represent concepts and reason logically about facts.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Propositional & First-Order Logic
lessons.desc: Representing logical relations, syntax, semantics, and inference proofs.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Semantic Networks & Frames
lessons.desc: Structuring conceptual links, inheritance, and object properties.

modules.title: Module 4: Machine Learning Basics
modules.desc: Introduction to data-driven model learning.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Supervised vs Unsupervised Learning
lessons.desc: Understanding labeled vs unlabeled data training procedures.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Linear Regression & Decision Trees
lessons.desc: Formulating classic machine learning algorithms and prediction workflows.

modules.title: Module 5: Natural Language Processing
modules.desc: Processing and understanding human languages.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Tokenization, Stemming & POS Tagging
lessons.desc: Basic syntax preprocessing methods for unstructured texts.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Sentiment Analysis & TF-IDF
lessons.desc: Extracting emotional tones and document word weights.

modules.title: Module 6: Ethics & Future of AI
modules.desc: Evaluating the societal impacts and limitations of artificial agents.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Bias, Fairness & Accountability in AI
lessons.desc: Mitigating demographic biases in training data.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: General vs Narrow AI (AGI discussion)
lessons.desc: Analyzing limits of current AI systems compared to general intelligence.

name: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
description: Learn the theory and practice of deep neural networks, convolutional nets, recurrent networks, and transformers.

modules.title: Module 1: Foundations of Deep Learning
modules.desc: Mathematical foundations of deep learning architectures.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: From Biological to Artificial Neurons
lessons.desc: Understanding the perceptron, weights, biases, and summation functions.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Activation Functions (Sigmoid, ReLU, tanh)
lessons.desc: Applying non-linear mappings to model complex structures.

modules.title: Module 2: Training Neural Networks
modules.desc: Optimization, optimization models and error minimization.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Loss Functions & Cost Optimization
lessons.desc: Evaluating cross-entropy and mean squared error costs.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Backpropagation & Gradient Descent
lessons.desc: Computing loss derivatives using chain rule and updating parameters.

modules.title: Module 3: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs)
modules.desc: Grid data feature extraction and image processing.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Convolution & Pooling Operations
lessons.desc: Applying kernels for edge detection and dimension downsampling.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Classic Architectures: LeNet & AlexNet
lessons.desc: Reviewing history-making deep learning model templates.

modules.title: Module 4: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs)
modules.desc: Sequences, context vectors, and temporal prediction problems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Sequential Data & Hidden States
lessons.desc: Modeling text or time-series data with feedback neural loops.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: LSTMs & GRUs
lessons.desc: Overcoming vanishing gradients with gating cell architectures.

modules.title: Module 5: Modern Transformer Models
modules.desc: The architecture powering LLMs and GPT models.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Attention Mechanism & Self-Attention
lessons.desc: Computing query, key, and value vectors for context relationships.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: BERT & GPT Architecture Overview
lessons.desc: Contrasting encoder-only and decoder-only transformer stacks.

modules.title: Module 6: Deployment & Scaling
modules.desc: Moving model code to production environments.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Model Quantization & Pruning
lessons.desc: Reducing file size and resource latency of neural graphs.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Deploying Models with ONNX & TensorFlow Serving
lessons.desc: Publishing neural network endpoints behind web servers.

name: Full-Stack Web Development
description: Build production-grade web applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, and modern databases.

modules.title: Module 1: Modern HTML & CSS Layouts
modules.desc: Structuring and styling responsive screen designs.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Flexbox & Grid Systems
lessons.desc: Positioning elements along axes or inside coordinate meshes.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Responsive Design & Tailwind CSS
lessons.desc: Writing utility classes and media queries for flexible layouts.

modules.title: Module 2: JavaScript ES6+ & TypeScript
modules.desc: Mastering script logic and static typing systems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Promises, Async/Await & Event Loop
lessons.desc: Understanding the asynchronous nature of browsers and JS runtimes.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Typing Variables, Interfaces & Generics
lessons.desc: Adding static compile check definitions to web application code.

modules.title: Module 3: Frontend Frameworks (React)
modules.desc: Component-based screen state synchronization.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: State Management & Custom Hooks
lessons.desc: Managing reactivity, props, local state, and custom hook abstractions.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Client Routing & Single Page Apps
lessons.desc: Handling browser URL transitions asynchronously without page reloads.

modules.title: Module 4: Backend API Development
modules.desc: Writing server-side backend logic handlers.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: RESTful API Principles & Express.js
lessons.desc: Designing route endpoints with standard HTTP action methods.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Middleware Pattern & Authentication
lessons.desc: Securing routes, parsing payloads, and signing JSON Web Tokens.

modules.title: Module 5: Databases & ORMs
modules.desc: Connecting to and managing transactional databases.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: SQL vs NoSQL: PostgreSQL & MongoDB
lessons.desc: Choosing between structured table relations and document schemas.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Schema Migrations with Prisma ORM
lessons.desc: Mapping javascript models to tables and managing db tables.

modules.title: Module 6: Testing & Deployment
modules.desc: Automating validation tests and launching to server hosting.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Unit Testing with Jest & Vitest
lessons.desc: Writing code scripts to assert component and function correctness.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: CI/CD Pipelines & Vercel/Docker Deployment
lessons.desc: Deploying code changes automatically with Docker containerization.

name: Data Structures & Algorithms in Python
description: Master problem-solving techniques using lists, trees, graphs, sorting, and dynamic programming.

modules.title: Module 1: Complexity Analysis & Big O
modules.desc: Evaluating resource efficiency of algorithms.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Time & Space Complexity Definitions
lessons.desc: Understanding constant, linear, quadratic, and logarithmic growth metrics.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Iterative vs Recursive Big O Analysis
lessons.desc: Evaluating execution run times of loops compared to recursive trees.

modules.title: Module 2: Linear Data Structures
modules.desc: Sequential element storage blocks.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Dynamic Arrays & Linked Lists
lessons.desc: Comparing random access indexing to pointer node references.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Stacks, Queues & Double-ended Queues
lessons.desc: Enforcing LIFO and FIFO item addition and retrieval constraints.

modules.title: Module 3: Trees & Binary Search Trees
modules.desc: Non-linear hierarchical nodes representation.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Binary Tree Traversals (Pre, In, Post)
lessons.desc: Implementing Depth-First Search patterns across hierarchical structures.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Self-balancing Trees: AVL & Red-Black Basics
lessons.desc: Maintaining O(log N) heights through rotation operations.

modules.title: Module 4: Sorting & Searching Algorithms
modules.desc: Ordering values and locating items fast.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Quick Sort vs Merge Sort Performance
lessons.desc: Comparing in-place partition swaps to divide-and-conquer merges.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Binary Search & Two-Pointer Techniques
lessons.desc: Halving search spaces and traversing linear arrays simultaneously.

modules.title: Module 5: Graph Algorithms
modules.desc: Modeling nodes and connectivity relations.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Graph Representations: Adjacency List & Matrix
lessons.desc: Evaluating storage memory vs edge lookup efficiency tradeoffs.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: BFS, DFS & Dijkstra's Shortest Path
lessons.desc: Traversing structures and calculating minimum weighted distances.

modules.title: Module 6: Dynamic Programming & Greedy
modules.desc: Optimization methods using overlapping subproblems.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Memoization vs Tabulation Concepts
lessons.desc: Contrasting top-down recursion caches with bottom-up grid tables.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Knapsack Problem & Coin Change Analysis
lessons.desc: Applying optimal substructure properties to solve selection problems.
